results.title: Gold heads for first weekly gain since May on easing Fed outlook
results.description: Soft US job numbers and lower energy prices have led investors to scale back bets on monetary policy tightening, which tends to be a headwind for non-yielding gold.

results.title: Samsung 75-Inch Frame Pro TV $600 Off—Art Meets Display
results.description: The 2025 Samsung Frame Pro is $1,898 in a bundle with protection. Neo QLED upgrade delivers design-first TV experience with matte screen.
